summary: Completed testing of Admin Calendar and Reservations features for Car Rental Admin App. All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend calendar page working correctly with CSS Grid layout, day selection showing departure/return details, and reservation status badges visible.

integration_issues.issue: data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity (prev/next month buttons) not detected by Playwright, though buttons are visually present and functional

issues: Minor: shadow* style props deprecation warnings in console (use boxShadow instead)

action_items: Consider using nativeID instead of data-testid for better React Native Web Playwright compatibility on TouchableOpacity elements
Update shadow* style props to use boxShadow to clear console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper TypeScript interfaces for CalendarEvent and OverdueItem
CSS Grid injection for web platform is a good workaround for React Native Web limitations
Proper async/await patterns used in API calls with error handling

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Calendar page loads, day selection works, details panel shows, reservations page shows all cards with visible status badges)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin calendar page at /admin/calendar uses CSS Grid injected via document.createElement('style'). Calendar days have data-testid format calendar-day-YYYY-MM-DD. The reservations page at /admin/reservations was fixed by replacing FlatList with ScrollView+map. All status badges are now visible. Backend APIs /api/admin/calendar and /api/admin/overdue are fully functional.

calendar_page.monthly_grid: PASS - CSS Grid layout displaying correctly
calendar_page.departure_return_indicators: PASS - Blue (departure) and purple (return) badges visible on days with events
calendar_page.day_selection: PASS - Clicking day shows departure/return/ongoing event details below
calendar_page.legend: PASS - Shows Départ, Retour, Retard, En cours with color indicators
calendar_page.month_navigation: PASS - Prev/next month arrows visible and functional

overdue_alert.banner: NOT_TRIGGERED - No overdue reservations currently in system to test banner display

reservations_page.card_display: PASS - All 14 reservations displayed with ScrollView+map
reservations_page.status_badges: PASS - Visible status badges (Confirmée, En attente, Annulée)
reservations_page.filter_tabs: PASS - All filter tabs (Toutes, En attente, Espèces, etc.) working
reservations_page.stats_section: PASS - Shows 14 Réservations, 5 Actives, CHF 810 Revenus

backend_apis./api/admin/calendar: PASS - Returns events with correct structure including is_overdue, days_overdue
backend_apis./api/admin/overdue: PASS - Returns empty array when no overdue (correctly)
backend_apis./api/admin/reservations: PASS - Returns enriched reservations with user_name, vehicle_name
